surveys.comment: day (tall, dark, good looking guy) really listened to me. solved my problem and explained until i understood how to set up the device.

i waited a lengthy time and when called to the desk the person left to check everyone else in.  then another salesman came and helped me.  he was courteous and helpful.  i’ve been a long time customer - it’s hard to get answers over the phone or the chat process.
i like xfinity and my service was bad for over 2 months and as long as i get nice refund i can pass xfinity along to family and friends

the store representative was fantastic.  he went above and beyond.  i did not give it a 10 bc i had to personally go in to the store to resolve and issue that i called 4 times for over the phone and everyone kept telling me it was resolved, but was not.  it was only resolved when i went to the store, which really was unnecessary, but the rep there was amazing.
the associate was so great

please know my 10 is for jaime on 2942 s cicero ave unit a, cicero, il 60804. i was greeted the moment i walked in and was assisted immediately. making my visit less than 5 minutes which was amazing. i was expecting a long wait which was not the case
eric was very helpful and explained how the  problem could be fixed.
prices
4 people had just walked in ahead of me and my wait was minimal. all of the agents were all pleasant and helpful especially my agent
he was very helpful.
aj helped me with returning a device and check into the account. he was patient, courteous and reassured everything looked good.
the worker was very friendly and helpful
the representative was extremely helpful and friendly.
rep was talkative but didn’t understand my issue or how to fix it.
good customer service representative
the service is consistently good. the staff member that helped me upgrade my phone was fantastic.
just returning an old modem-quick and easy transition. efficiently completed.
competent and efficient advice and service
was greeted and helped by angela. she got my account updated for the services i wanted.  thought it was going to be a pain but she did it quickly. i was in and out. great customer service.
excellent service by customer service rep.
l m
there are no outages. nothing will connect. no computer no tv no ringno arlo cameras

the associate that took care of me was excellent and provided amazing service. they helped me lower my bill and gave me a new equipment. the associates name was dalton and the xfinity store was in michigan city, indiana.
the guy who helped us to get a new phone was amazing. was professional and took his time
the individual that helped me was amazing! i had a modem issue and he got me in and out super quickly. i got home and it ended up working! so i’m very pleased 😀
the young man was very nice he welcomed us  as entered the store we did our exchange and we thanked him and said are good by’s.
the rep who waited on me at the xfinity store, alicia,  was very knowledgeable and helpful. explained everything to me so it was easy to understand my options. she made the entire process simple.

ajel (i hope i remember the store representative name & spelling it correctly) was so nice, supper informative, straight & very friendly even with my kid too 😀 he offered me the best deal if we decide to switch but we can't as we are stuck with 3 years plan with devices. the store is super organized 👌

we have had a horrible experience with xfinity getting our tv and internet hooked up. our experience with your service department is the worst we have ever experienced. the last call i made we were on the phone for 55 minutes just trying to get a service time for a technician. the store gave us an extender when we enrolled. never explained what it was for or that it had an extra monthly charge. we have since returned it. we have made 5 service calls with little to no resolution. if there is was another service provider in our neighborhood we would never be using xfinity. those reasons are why i rated you a 0
store was clean, team was friendly, and service was outstanding
exchanged old cable box promptly and answered questions.

the agents were very helpful and patient in trying to resolve any problems. they were pleasant and friendly which i also appreciated. it took a while but they finally got my new phone up and running well.

my daughter connected it with no problem  n found she needed a new box so she went back to the store she asked a few questions n got it set up. now when i turn it on a lot of possibilities come up when before it would be the station it was on when i turned it off. when i try to tape geberal hospital it tells me i need a subscription n i have no idea what that entails.  all i know before. all i did was press the red button to record.  the equipment installation was quick   for that u say 10
the person who helped me was fantastic
too expensive
the woman who helped me was so patient and kind.  it was only her 2nd day and she made sure everything was working for me before i left.  shes amazing!
mario was so helpful and patient with this old lady!
erika was the person who handled our transaction in a very positive way! she did an excellent job!
ease of use.
service was excellent we were greeted right away and attended no wait the hole process was so quickly and efficiently.
yes
no wait at xfinity store to return cable tv equipment, quick transaction, answered all of my questions, very professional and courteous.
because in this opportunity i was given information that was useful, the problem was solved and i could pay my bill directly at the store. there had been a prior problem.
why not?
because the guy who helped us was amazingly patient, kind and professional!
no high pressure tactics. happily did as i asked. patient with me explaining the technology components with the new modem.
the employees were polite, patient, and helpful.

i couldn't get any information on how xfinity would bury the lines from the transformer to my house, i was told they'd just do what they want.  also i haven't had service at that address for 1.5 years and xfinity wouldn't offer me a discount
i was greeted promptly when walking in.  i was directed to the counter where an agent was waiting for me. he quickly resolved my concern, and i was on my way quickly.
it was neutral. i was disconnecting service and returning equipment.
you’re too expensive
alec judd helped solve my issue very quickly and efficiently.

on july 5th, i requested an appointment for a service technician to come out and look at my modem because it was constantly dropping signal and had slow speeds. the earliest option given to me was july 10th. i agreed to that. on july 8th a xfinity rep called me and asked if i was still experiencing issues and told them yes i was and that i still wanted my technician appointment. then the morning of the 10th, suddenly i received a text saying my appointment had been cancelled. i received no explanation. at that moment i made an appointment with at&t and switched over. that is why i have cancelled xfinity and do not recommend it to anyone.
very good and so knowledgeable. fixed my problem in a minute
